member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือก

root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||''||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as mem_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.group_name_show, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as group_control_name FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.represent_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '011001' and '011009' ) order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
